message:
chore(tests): refresh conformance artifacts and perf budget reports

Re-run the extension conformance suite and performance budget evaluator
to capture current measurements. All budgets continue to PASS.

Conformance artifacts (tests/ext_conformance/):
- PROVENANCE_VERIFICATION.json: timestamp refreshed to 17:50:24Z;
  208/208 artifacts verified OK (no regressions)
- RISK_REVIEW.json: timestamp refreshed to 17:50:24Z; 208 artifacts
  reviewed, 179 license-clear
- CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md + conformance_summary.json: timestamp refreshed
  to 17:48:02Z; same pass/fail counts as previous run
- Minor trailing-newline normalization in PROVENANCE_VERIFICATION.json

Performance budget reports (tests/perf/reports/):
- PERF_BUDGETS.md + budget_summary.json: timestamp refreshed to
  17:51:39Z
- event_dispatch_p99: 45 → 41 us (improved, well within 5000 us budget)
- sustained_load_rss_growth: 0.0% → 1.9% (still within 5% budget)
- idle_memory_rss: 4.23 → 4.15 MB (marginal improvement, 50 MB budget)
- budget_events.jsonl: updated with new actual values matching above

All 4 measurable budgets PASS; 9 remain NO_DATA (expected for missing
criterion/pijs_workload data).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
